title: Fix missing recent evolution data in matrix

log.context: Fix missing recent evolution data in matrix

Done. Here's the summary:

**Root cause:** The Python congress activity (`/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/congress_act.py`, line 572) serializes `evolution_results` with `json.dumps()` before sending it to the clunger PATCH endpoint. This stores evolution as a JSON string in the session file. The matrix endpoint (`/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts`, line 988) cast this string directly as `Record<string, unknown>`, so `.evolved`, `.fired`, `.retained` were all `undefined` on the string objec...(truncated)
